$comment: Layer B selection cases for LOCKER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (group REDEFINES RG, docs/redefines-edited.md). Input is a 4-digit member id and the balance in whole cents; WS-MONEY REDEFINES the record group leaf for leaf, so the balance digits are reinterpreted at scale 2 (a per-leaf decimal shift). Candidate B carries the wrong-leaf re-slice - the money view read from the id leaf's bytes - so fee and total come out wrong whenever id*100 != cents. Cases cover the 200.00 tier boundary, just over it, the fee half-cent tie (cents = 20 mod 40), and small and large balances.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 LOCKER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-locker)
